responses: Hello! Welcome to LEC IntelliSupport. How may I assist you today?
Hi there! I'm the IntelliSupport assistant. Tell me about the IT issue you are experiencing.
Good day! I'm here to help you troubleshoot IT problems or submit a support request.
You're welcome! Let me know if you need any more assistance.
Happy to help! If you have another IT issue, just ask.
Goodbye! If you need IT support again, I'm here to help.
Have a great day! Feel free to return if you need technical assistance.
Please check if the power cable is properly connected.
Ensure the power outlet is working and press the power button again.
If the issue persists, please submit a Hardware Support Ticket.

patterns: system taking too long to open programs
responses: Try restarting your computer to clear temporary processes.
Check if many applications are running simultaneously.
If the issue continues, please submit a Performance Support Request.
Please ensure the printer is powered on and connected to the network.
Check if the printer has paper and no paper jams.
If the issue continues, please submit a Printer Support Request.
Please check if your device is connected to the correct WiFi network.
Try restarting your router or reconnecting to the network.
If the issue persists, please report a Network Support Ticket.
Please check your internet connection and try sending the email again.
Ensure your email account credentials are correct.
If the issue continues, please submit an Email Support Request.
Try reconnecting the keyboard if it is external.
Restart your computer and test the keyboard again.
If the problem continues, please request a keyboard replacement.
Please check if the mouse is properly connected.
Try plugging the mouse into a different USB port.
If the issue continues, please submit a hardware support request.

patterns: i need a new software installed
responses: You can request software installation through the IntelliSupport portal.
Please submit a Software Installation Request with the application name and version.
Please use the password reset option on the login page.
If you cannot reset your password, submit an Account Support Request.
You can submit an IT support ticket through the IntelliSupport dashboard.
Please provide details about the issue, including device type and error message.
